stem: A line intersects two parallel lines, forming four acute angles and four obtuse angles. The measure of one of the acute angles is (9x − 560)°. The sum of the measures of one of the acute angles and three of the obtuse angles is (−18x + w)°. What is the value of w?
explanation: All four acute angles are equal and each obtuse angle is its supplement, (180 − (9x − 560))° = (−9x + 740)°. One acute plus three obtuse is (9x − 560) + 3(−9x + 740) = −18x + 1,660. Matching (−18x + w)° gives w = 1,660.
